subject: Login error after password reset
body: Hello team, I am unable to access the dashboard after resetting my password. The error message says invalid token and the issue is blocking my work. I am frustrated because this is urgent.

subject: Re: Login error after password reset
body: Hi Alice, thank you for reporting the issue. We identified the login bug and we are working on a fix right now. I am sorry for the inconvenience and I hope to resolve it very quickly.

subject: Broken export feature in analytics panel
body: The export feature is broken again and the generated file is empty. This problem is very annoying for the operations team and we need a stable solution today.

subject: Re: Broken export feature in analytics panel
body: We deployed a patch for the export issue and initial tests look good. Please try again and confirm whether the report works correctly now. Thank you for your patience.

subject: API timeout and connection failure
body: Our integration with your API is timing out and several requests fail with a connection error. The situation is serious because the service is unstable and users are complaining.

subject: Re: API timeout and connection failure
body: We found the root cause of the timeout and the service performance is improving. The latest monitoring results are positive and the connection should be reliable again this evening.

subject: Invoice 4831 looks incorrect
body: Good morning, the invoice amount for January looks incorrect and the subscription fee seems higher than agreed. We are disappointed and would appreciate a quick review.

subject: Re: Invoice 4831 looks incorrect
body: Thank you for the note. We checked the invoice and found a billing configuration mistake. We will issue a corrected invoice and a refund today.

subject: Payment confirmation for February subscription
body: This email confirms that the payment for the February subscription was completed successfully. Everything looks correct on our side and we are happy with the process.

subject: Re: Payment confirmation for February subscription
body: Great, thank you for the confirmation. We are pleased to hear that the payment process was smooth. Please let us know if you need any additional invoice document.

subject: Charged twice for annual renewal
body: We were charged twice for the annual renewal and this duplicate payment is a serious problem for our accounting team. Please reverse the extra charge as soon as possible.

subject: Re: Charged twice for annual renewal
body: I understand the concern and I apologize for the duplicate charge. The second payment has already been refunded and the banking notice should arrive shortly. Thank you for your understanding.

subject: Interview invitation for data analyst role
body: Hello Maria, we reviewed your application and we were impressed by your profile. We would like to invite you to an interview next week to discuss the data analyst position.

subject: Re: Interview invitation for data analyst role
body: Thank you very much for the invitation. I am excited about the opportunity and I would be delighted to meet the team next week.

subject: Next steps after technical interview
body: Hi Daniel, thank you for the great conversation yesterday. The panel gave very positive feedback and we would like to move your application to the final stage.

subject: Re: Next steps after technical interview
body: I appreciate the update and I am very happy to continue in the process. The interview was engaging and the role sounds excellent.

subject: Position closed update
body: Thank you for your interest in the position. We enjoyed meeting you, but we decided to move forward with another candidate. We understand this news may be disappointing.

subject: Re: Position closed update
body: Thank you for letting me know. Although I am disappointed, I appreciate the transparent process and I hope we can stay in touch for future roles.
